---
title: "Outputs"
date: 2026/04/01
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
sidebar: true
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
---

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="english"}

{{< include _outputs-en.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="german"}

{{< include _outputs-de.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="french"}

{{< include _outputs-fr.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="czech"}

{{< include _outputs-cs.qmd >}}

:::::

::::: {.content-visible when-profile="norwegian"}

{{< include _outputs-no.qmd >}}

:::::

<!-- Suggested format:

**Student Name** (YYYY). *Thesis title*.
[PhD / MSc] thesis, University Name.
[Link](link)
-->
